Nf3 d6 3. d4 cxd4 4. Nxd4 Nf6 5. Nc3 a6 6. Be2 6. Be2 is not played as often in response to black pushing 5. ...a6 as is [[../6. Bg5/]] or [[../6. Be3/]], but it is a solid move. White's bishop at e2 can keep an eye on g4 while allowing for a king side castle. ==Theory table== {{Chess Opening Theory/Table}}. '''1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 d6 3.d4 cxd4 4.Nxd4 Nf6 5.Nc3 a6 6. Be2'''
